description: Mobile-first classic Snake. Swipe to control direction (or arrow keys / WASD on desktop); snake eats food, grows, and speeds up; collide with self or wall ends the game. 3 difficulty modes via grid size (15×15 / 20×20 / 25×25). Canvas-rendered with grid lines and soft cell padding. localStorage persists best score. Fully Lego-composed: imports entities.snake-game verbatim. mob-001..016 mobile wisdom applied.
qualityNotes: Hand-crafted Lego-composed reference for recipe.snake. Closes the known matcher gotcha (gotchas_template_bias_misroute_via_arcade_category.md) — snake prompts previously misrouted to recipe.maze-arcade because TemplateCatalogService funneled all arcade words to arcade-pacman-v1. Now snake has its own recipe + template + matchKeywords. Demonstrates: (1) inline source-copy of GridBoard + SnakeGame (verbatim, marker present), (2) canvas rendering with cell-by-cell paint + soft grid lines + circular food, (3) pointer swipe via SnakeGame.directionFromSwipe helper, (4) keyboard ArrowKeys + WASD parity, (5) speed scales with score (every food shaves 4ms, floors at 70ms), (6) 3 difficulty modes via grid-size pills, (7) localStorage best-score persistence, (8) end-game overlay with new-best announcement.

discriminator.reasoning: Hand-crafted by platform team to close a long-standing matcher misroute (snake → maze-arcade). Composes recipe.snake's required Lego (entities.snake-game). AntiKeywords for snake.io / slither.io / agar.io / centipede / tron disambiguate from agario-style growth games and arcade neighbors.
